backend/main.mo: Main actor defining content types (events, scare zones, shows, attractions, haunted houses) with type-specific fields, audition form types (scare actor, dance, costume character), and authorization mixins for access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that initializes new themed lands (Kid Grove), merch shops (Dead Eyes), and food booths (Paint & Death Eats) with sample data for upgrading from old actor state to new actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: Color Paint show (2028), Kid Grove themed land (2050), Dead Eyes merch booth, Paint & Death split-concept food booth, and their associated frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including App.tsx routing, header/footer layouts, sections for haunted houses/food/merch/auditions, and content data modules with detailed feature descriptions.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component states.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the TCEA Scream Park application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with QueryClientProvider, hash-based routing for all pages (haunted houses, food booths, auditions, employee portals), background audio management, and home page section composition including new UpcomingExpansionsSection.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Manages background audio playback (chainsaw and clown laugh loops) with autoplay detection, volume control, and fallback handling. Exposes callbacks to parent components for handling autoplay blocking and manual playback requests.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI controls for toggling sound on/off and adjusting volume with a slider. Shows an "Enable sound" button when autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays a full-page access denied message for users without administrator permissions to access the content management system.
frontend/src/components/auth/EmployeeGua: Route guard component that verifies employee authentication and authorization, showing login prompts or access denied messages for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component for Internet Identity authentication that handles login/logout with loading states and query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, blocking interaction until profile setup is complete.
frontend/src/components/layout/EmployeeL: Layout wrapper for employee portal pages with branded header, breadcrumb navigation, and footer indicating confidential/internal use.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section component with centered title, optional subtitle and icon, and separator for consistent page section styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Site footer displaying an extreme haunt warning with liability waiver text and attribution with link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Main site header component with navigation menu, authentication controls, sound controls, and employee-specific links. Handles scroll effects, mobile menu, and routing between hash-based sections and routes.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video overlay component with play/pause, mute/unmute controls, and keyboard escape support. Handles autoplay with muted audio and provides a dark overlay interface.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Section describing TCEA Scream Park's building and dark history, including the 2022 opening cancellation due to an evil spirit and eventual 2026 opening. Features a hero image and narrative content.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Displays three perks of auditioning (food, training, scary vibes) in a grid of cards with icons and descriptions.
Provides two call-to-action cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with buttons that trigger respective signup dialogs.
Dialog form for costume character audition submissions with fields for personal info, experience, vocal skills, and preferences. Requires Internet Identity authentication and submits to backend.
Dialog form for dancer audition applications requiring authentication, collecting name, age, experience, interests, and location preference before submitting via mutation hook.
Dialog form for scare actor audition applications with Internet Identity authentication, collecting applicant details and role preferences before submission.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions section displaying three audition types (Costume Character, Scream Team, Dancer) with cards, requirements, and signup dialogs. Includes navigation to full auditions page and perks block.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Section showcasing an interior elevation image of the Clown Town haunted house with descriptive text about the twisted circus atmosphere and carnival horror elements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Costume: Announcement section for 2030 investment in costume characters including Lola & Asher rabbits and Max character. Features character cards with images and descriptions, linking to auditions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Employe: Conditional component that displays an employee portal access card only to authenticated employees, providing navigation to secret tunnels and backstage areas.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booth cards with images, descriptions, menu highlights, and buttons to view details or rules. Includes logic to match booth names to generated images and determine which booths have detail pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders a grid of haunted house cards with images, descriptions, wait times, and buttons to view guest rules or house details. Uses slugify utility and hardcoded navigation logic for specific houses.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Hero section with autoplay video background, TCEA Scream Park logo, promotional text about the 2028 Fire Remix show, and call-to-action buttons for auditions and scare actor/dancer applications.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Video player section with custom controls for play/pause, mute/unmute, and fullscreen toggle. Includes autoplay detection, error handling, video end detection that triggers clown laugh audio, and fallback fullscreen overlay.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Displays information about the Main Street Plaza Procession event at 6pm, featuring an image and descriptive text about sliders, stilt walkers, zombies, and other creatures in the parade.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Information section showing operating hours (Fridays-Sunday, 5pm onward), ticket pricing ($30), pass options via PassSelector component, and park rules including an 11pm nightly release warning and scare actor interaction guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Displays a filterable merch storefront section with Felix's Merch Booth header image, category filters, and a grid of product cards. Includes product filtering by category and handles image loading errors.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Defines the PassOption interface and exports an array of nine pass options (Bloody, U Think U Brave, Regular, Horn, Content Creator, Touch, Skip the Line, Blackout, Kid) with id, name, price, and description.
React component that renders a radio-button pass selector with visual feedback, a 'Secure Your Pass' button, and a temporary confirmation alert when a pass is selected.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders a grid of scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and action buttons to view zone details or guest rules. Includes hover effects and navigation to dedicated scare zone pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Displays a grid of four haunted house sneak peek cards (Schoolhouse, Clown Town, Hell Hole, Toys Come to Play) with images, taglines, and navigation buttons to full sneak peek pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Renders a grid of live show cards with images, descriptions, and badges indicating haunt season exclusivity or upcoming year. Handles image loading errors gracefully.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a carousel section for Sliders of Decade show content with image/video slides, navigation controls, thumbnail selection, and fullscreen video playback support. Uses custom hooks for autoplay and fullscreen functionality.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Displays teaser cards for two upcoming 2027 haunted houses (Hogs Pen and Shattered Minds) with taglines and descriptive teasers. Features a prominent header announcing new attractions.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser section with a centered card displaying a "Many Things to Come" message with animated sparkles icon.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming events in a grid of cards with image galleries, event details, and a special button to view the Frosted Haunt event details. Includes a carousel component for multiple event images with error handling.
Shows planned themed lands for future park expansions with details like opening year, size, and featured shows. Only renders if there are planned lands in the data.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: React component that renders a layered horror-themed background with a chainsaw image, animated fire/smoke/chainsaw/blood overlays, orange/green tints, noise texture, and scanline effects.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports an object containing an array of food booth data with name, tagline, description, and menu items for various horror-themed food vendors (Clown town Chicken, Hell hole bbq, Schoolhouse Fish, Asylum Seekers, Felix's Yum, etc.).
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Exports an object mapping attraction names to image paths for haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, merch shops, auditions, shows, and upcoming events.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Exports structured guest rules for haunted house attractions (Open Ice Tomb, Wax Works, Terror Hell Hole) organized into Safety Rules, Behavior Rules, and Health & Safety Warnings sections.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Exports an array of haunted house attractions with names, taglines, and detailed descriptions for each themed horror experience (e.g., Clown Town, Asylum Hell, Schoolhouse Break and Blackout).
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Defines merchandise shop locations with names, items sold, and price ranges for various horror-themed products throughout the park.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and catalog data for browsable merchandise products organized by category (hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, plushies) and character (Riley, Ace, Kevin, Rocky).
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of outdoor scare zone attractions with detailed descriptions of immersive horror experiences like Carnival Bros Circus, Zombie Hell, and Screamtown Chaos.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Provides preview content for the Schoolhouse haunted house attraction including title, description, and image path for a scenic elevation view.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Exports an array of live show attractions with descriptions, haunt season availability flags, and opening years for performances like Circus Town, Fire Remix, and Camp Riley.
frontend/src/content/showsEntrance.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and content for the backstage Shows & Processions Secret Entrance, including unlock year (2040), access instructions, and facility details.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines slider carousel items (images and videos) showcasing a 'Decade of Terror' haunt season show with titles and descriptions for each slide.
frontend/src/content/tceaTunnels.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and detailed content for TCEA Tunnels employee facilities including secret entrance, dormitories, cafeteria, TV room, and lounge areas.
frontend/src/content/themedLands.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and data for future themed park lands, currently featuring Kid Grove (500,000 sq ft family area opening 2050).
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Exports a static array of upcoming theme park events including horror nights, water festivals, and special seasonal events with dates, descriptions, and warnings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: React Query hook that fetches audition links from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides mutation hooks for submitting three types of audition forms (scare actor, dancer, costume character) to the backend with query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Authorization hooks that query user roles, admin status, employee status, and user profiles from the backend actor, enabled only when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: React hook that manages video autoplay with browser compatibility handling, detecting autoplay blocks and providing play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on content items (events, scare zones, shows, attractions) including fetching, creating, updating, deleting, and seeding initial content.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployeeEvents.ts: React Query hook that fetches upcoming events for authenticated employees based on the current date.
React Query hook that fetches the event unlock status for authenticated users from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: React hook that manages fullscreen mode for a given element with cross-browser support, providing enter, exit, and toggle functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
React Query hooks for fetching and updating the main haunt schedule (EventDateRange arrays), with automatic cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: React hook for managing sound preferences (enabled/volume) with localStorage persistence and default values.
frontend/src/hooks/useTunnelData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching tunnel maps, room assignments, and tunnel schedules from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind configuration, OKLCH-based horror theme (orange/black/green), employee portal theme, custom utilities for glows and shadows, and forced white text styling.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions for formatting backend types (dates, content types, event types, scare levels, etc.) into human-readable strings and generating type-specific field summaries.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: Protected page displaying actor staffing information with authentication check, login prompt for unauthenticated users, and loading states for staffing counts query.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Public page displaying audition links with hiring banner, filtering out placeholder URLs, and handling loading/error states for audition data.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Displays a filterable calendar view of all content items (events, attractions, shows, scare zones) grouped by date with support for date range expansion and URL hash navigation to specific dates.
Detail page for the 'Candy Cane Carnage' food booth showing its image, description, tagline, and menu items with navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Chainsaw Cold' scare zone featuring an extreme horror warning alert, zone description, and a button to view guest rules before entering.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Sneak peek detail page for the 'Clown Town' haunted house displaying its image, name, tagline, and description with back navigation to home.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin content management system page with authentication/authorization checks, allowing admins to create, update, delete content items, manage schedules, and seed initial content.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: Audition submission form for dancers requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting personal info, experience, role preferences, and submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: Detail page for the 'Eggnog Exorcism' food booth showing its image, description, tagline, and menu items with navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeUpcomingEvent: Employee-only page displaying upcoming events and features with lock/unlock status, event images, descriptions, and navigation to detail pages. Uses useEmployeeUpcomingEvents hook to fetch event data and conditionally renders cards based on unlock status.
frontend/src/pages/FlynCharacterPage.tsx: Employee detail page for the Flyn character showing biography, appearance schedule, costume details, and performance notes. Content visibility is controlled by useEventUnlockStatus hook checking hasFlynAppearance flag.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: Public-facing detail page for the Frosted Haunt seasonal event (Nov-Dec 2026) featuring event description, warnings, highlights for haunted houses and scare zones. Includes navigation back to upcoming events section.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: Public detail page for the Gingerdead Bakes food booth displaying booth information, tagline, description, and menu items. Retrieves data from foodBooths content and navigates back to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Dynamic rules page that displays guest safety rules for specific haunted houses or scare zones based on URL hash parameters. Parses route to determine attraction type and slug, then renders corresponding rules from guestRules content.
frontend/src/pages/HappilyScaryAfterPage: Employee detail page for the Happily Scary After fireworks show with show description, schedule, viewing locations, and employee coordination info. Unlock status controlled by useEventUnlockStatus hook checking hasFireworks flag.
Detail page for the 'Hellfire Hot Cocoa' food booth displaying booth information, tagline, description, and a menu list with optional item descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Detail page for the 'Terror Hell hole' haunted house featuring a main card with image and description, plus a secondary card showcasing 'Vicky's Saw' scenic elevation with extended narrative content.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Laser Hell' scare zone showing zone name, location with map pin icon, tagline, and description with error handling for missing zones.
frontend/src/pages/ObsessionScreamPage.t: Detail page for 'Obsession Scream' haunted house featuring extreme horror warnings, character introduction for Leslie, and a button to view guest rules with 18+ age restrictions.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Detail page for 'Open Ice Tomb' Christmas-horror haunted house with extreme cold temperature warnings, safety alerts, and a prominent button to view guest rules before entering.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Detail page for the 'Ornament Ossuary' food booth displaying booth information, tagline, description, and a formatted menu list with optional item descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/PaintDeathBoothPage.t: Displays detailed information for the 'Paint & Death' food booth, splitting the menu into Paint Side and Death Side sections with themed styling and a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Shows the 'Santa's Hell' scare zone detail page with an extreme horror warning alert, zone description, image, and a button to view guest rules before entering.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Provides a form for scare actor audition applications requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting name, age, height, weight, experience, interests, and role preference before submission.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Displays a sneak peek card for the Schoolhouse attraction with a large image, title, subtitle, and description, with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/SecretTunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page showing confidential backstage tunnel maps, room assignments, and schedules with loading states, error handling, and restricted access warnings.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Displays detailed information for the 'Sharks Hell' food booth including an image, description, and menu items with navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ShowsEntrancePage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying the secret entrance for shows and processions, with unlock status based on year, location details, and access instructions. Shows locked/unlocked state with grayscale image effect when locked.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Slider Doom' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and full menu with item descriptions. Includes back navigation to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/TCEATunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page showcasing TCEA underground tunnels with facilities including dorms, cafeteria, TV room, and secret entrance details with security notes. Displays facility images in a grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlayPage.ts: Full detail page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with hero image, extreme horror warning, 22-scene description, and character spotlights for Blippy and Jiffy. Includes navigation to house rules.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Simplified sneak peek page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house showing basic info, image, tagline, and description without full details. Provides back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Detail page for 'Wax Works' Christmas-horror haunted house with extreme horror warning, house description, and navigation to guest rules. Features hero image and 18+ age requirement notice.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Detail page component for the 'Wrath of Wrapping' food booth, displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for handling event date ranges, including date comparison, date key generation, and expanding date ranges into individual date keys with leap year support.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Simple utility function that converts text strings into URL-friendly slugs by lowercasing, removing special characters, and replacing spaces with hyphens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Comprehensive URL parameter management utilities supporting both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence for parameters like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including horror-themed colors, animations (pulse-glow, strobe-flash, horror-drift), employee portal colors, and custom font families (Inter, Creepster).
project_state.json: Project state tracking document describing a horror theme park app with multiple attractions (shows, haunted houses, lands, merch/food booths), AI-generated character images, and five implemented features including Color Paint show, Kid Grove land, Dead Eyes merch, Paint & Death food booth, and Obsession Scream haunted house.
